name: Base Breakout (Wyckoff)
description: Multi-scale RDP base detection. Runs RDP at two epsilon levels: fine (normal) to see internal structure, coarse (2.5× fine) to detect flatness. A base is where coarse RDP collapses a region into a tight price band after a meaningful prior decline, followed by a confirmed breakout. Price must still be above the base floor. Scores highest when pulling back toward the base ceiling.
author: system

tunable_params.label: Fine RDP Epsilon (%)
tunable_params.description: Fine-grain RDP sensitivity. Coarse = this × coarse_scale.

tunable_params.label: Coarse Scale Multiplier
tunable_params.description: Coarse epsilon = fine × this. Higher = only major structural moves visible.

tunable_params.label: Base Flatness Tolerance (%)
tunable_params.description: Max price range of coarse swing points in the base window. 0.15 = 15% band.

tunable_params.label: Min Base Duration (bars)
tunable_params.description: Minimum bars the base must span.

tunable_params.label: Min Prior Decline (%)
tunable_params.description: Required drop from prior peak to base ceiling before base qualifies.

tunable_params.label: Breakout Margin (%)
tunable_params.description: How far above base ceiling the breakout swing must clear.

tunable_params.label: Entry Zone (% above ceiling)
tunable_params.description: Price within this % above base ceiling = pullback entry zone (entry_ready=true).
